notes: The game itself runs OK but the editor does not. You can install a fan patch with real life teams, leagues, & players using .exe installer.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (radeonsi, navi22, LLVM 20.1.8, DRM 3.64, 6.16.7-200.fc42.x86_64)
notes: Despite the comments here, I did not get this to run. With default proton the game freezes and Fedora asks nicely if I want to quit the application or not. Switching to experimental helped me proceed after the initial loading screen and set up a season just to freeze on the player selection screen. Switching to ProtonGE 10-xx didn't help either.
